name_en: 5BC125: New MiuMiu MiuWander bag, bold new color design, made of top-grade imported calfskin, vintage matte hardware, utilizing curved lines to retain a playful feel, expressing a sporty elegance and contemporary versatile temperament, the bag shape is structured and full of personality, sweet and chic, large capacity, Dimensions: 20X13X7 cm
